question_intent: Calculate the average order value for customers in the Eastern region who have placed orders in the year 1996

plan.question_intent: Calculate the average order value for customers in the Eastern region who have placed orders in the year 1996
plan.detail_query: SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS subtotal FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid WHERE c.region = 'Eastern' AND strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1996' GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS subtotal
join_clauses: JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight
blocks.notes: This block calculates the subtotal for each order placed by customers in the Eastern region in 1996

blocks.notes: This block calculates the average order value for customers in the Eastern region who have placed orders in the year 1996

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the subtotal for each order placed by customers in the Eastern region in 1996

steps.clause: JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern' OR c.region IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern' OR c.region IS NULL) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1996')
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS subtotal
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern' OR c.region IS NULL) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1996')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average order value for customers in the Eastern region who have placed orders in the year 1996

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS subtotal
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern' OR c.region IS NULL) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1996')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(subtotal + freight) AS avg_order_value
FROM (SELECT c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS subtotal
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
WHERE (c.region = 'Eastern' OR c.region IS NULL) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1996')
GROUP BY c.customerid, c.companyname, o.orderid, o.orderdate, o.freight) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT contactname
FROM (SELECT c.contactname, o.orderid, SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_order_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customerid = o.customerid JOIN "order details" od ON o.orderid = od.orderid WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997' GROUP BY c.contactname, o.orderid ORDER BY total_order_value DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(sales_value)
FROM (SELECT c.categoryname, p.productname, od.unitprice, od.quantity, (od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS sales_value
FROM categories AS c
JOIN products AS p ON c.categoryid = p.categoryid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON p.productid = od.productid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Confections') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', (SELECT o.orderdate FROM orders AS o WHERE o.orderid = od.orderid)) = '1997')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average total order value (subtotal plus freight) for all orders placed by customers in the Eastern region or with no region specified during the year 1996?
